title: Node.js Learning Roadmap
description: A complete, staged path from beginner to expert — getting started and setup, JavaScript and TypeScript foundations, runtime architecture and internals, the module system, npm and package management, core built-in modules, asynchronous programming, file system, streams and buffers, networking, web servers and frameworks, databases, authentication and security, testing, error handling and debugging, performance and scaling, advanced runtime APIs, modern Node.js features, tooling, architecture and design patterns, deployment and DevOps, and the wider ecosystem and career.

stages.title: Introduction & Setup
stages.summary: What Node.js is, how to install it and how to run code.

nodes.description: The CLI, REPL, flags and executing scripts.
